codeReview.summary: The implementation satisfies the follow-up feature intent: the regenerated evidence artifact is anchored to a resolvable committed SHA, includes immutable remote check-run identity pointers (IDs and URLs) for lint/vitest/pytest/playwright on that same SHA, and explicitly records same-revision binding plus fail-closed required-check semantics.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ci-gate-worker skill procedure is still high-level for same-SHA remote-proof collection; transcript evidence shows substantial ad-hoc exploration before converging on a working sequence, suggesting the skill could codify a concrete retrieval flow (push/identify SHA, wait for required checks, capture check-run IDs/URLs, then write artifact).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 99550d11-ebd8-4d89-af9d-401796144e9a shows many exploratory GitHub API scans with repeated 'NO FULL MATCH' / 'no sha found with all required checks' before final successful evidence regeneration and commit 7845b14...

summary: Pass: commit 7845b14 resolves the prior scrutiny blocker by providing concrete same-SHA remote check-run proof in tests/artifacts/confidence-gates-final-evidence.json while preserving explicit fail-closed semantics.
